'''Syned''' was an ice-covered [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Syned system/Legends|Syned system]], in [[Grumani sector/Legends|Grumani sector]]. During the [[Republic Dark Age]], Syned was under the [[Chagras Hegemony|control]] of [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Chagras]], but after his [[Death/Legends|death]], it fell into the [[Arkadianate|hands]] of his daughter [[Arkadia Calimondra]].

==Description==
Located in a [[Star cluster/Legends|cluster]] of blue newborn [[Star/Legends|stars]], Syned was captured relatively recently, in [[Astronomer/Legends|astronomical]] terms, by its weak sun. Because of this, the planet's rotation period was extremely short. However, the heavy molten core of Syned counter-balanced the planet's fast rotation to produce a standard gravity environment.<ref name="KEG" /> Syned was orbited by an adolescent star, therefore its surface was entirely covered in ice and snow. The planet had little oxygen in its atmosphere, making it necessary for members of most sentient [[Species/Legends|species]] to don an environmental suit when outdoors.<ref name="KE" /> Physicists during the [[Republic Dark Age]] expected the planet to eventually tidally lock to its parent star, thawing the dayside. Its surface had a tortured appearance, with shattered ice sheets broken by ancient tectonic activity frozen into place.<ref name="KEG" />

[[File:Knight_Errant_novel.png|thumb|left|240px|Calimondretta]]
Syned was home to at least two non-sentient species: giant ice lizards known as [[beralyx]]es and [[Synedian algae]]. The latter thrived in the seas beneath the ice sheets covering the planet's surface. Synedian algae were used as both a source of fuel and food, being extracted through thermal veins and then processed at algae processing plants. Without these algae processing plants, Syned would be unable to sustain any civilization. The planet's reclamation facilities were also used to extract underwater minerals at a rate of one miligram at a time.<ref name="KE" />

The [[Dravian Starport]] was eventually built to serve as a waypoint between Syned and the desert world of [[Cotellier/Legends|Cotellier]].<ref name="TSB" />

==History==
===New Sith Wars===
At some point between [[1066 BBY]]<ref name="Knight Errant novel">[[Knight Errant (novel)|''Knight Errant'']], [[1066 BBY]] is given as the date in which the ''[[Charge Matrica]]'' began, and Chagras is mentioned to have established his realm at the conclusion of this event</ref> and [[1040 BBY]], Syned was under the [[Chagras Hegemony|control]] of [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Chagras]].<ref name="KEG" />

After Chagras' [[Death/Legends|death]] in [[1040 BBY]],<ref name="KEG" /> the world came into the possession of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Arkadia Calimondra]] and served as the capital of her [[Arkadianate|realm]]. In [[1032 BBY/Legends|1032 BBY]], the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Kerra Holt]] and [[Rusher's Brigade]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] leader [[Jarrow Rusher]] [[Siege of Calimondretta|escaped]] from Syned, damaging much of the city of [[Calimondretta]].<ref name="KE" />

===Galactic Civil War===
Eventually, through the use of protective domes and underground cities, a small outpost was established on the planet. This outpost eventually became a successful transfer station due to its proximity to the [[Duros Space Run]]. However, its importance eventually led to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] establishing a presence on the world. During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], each city was governed by a councilor who were very loyal to the Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governor]]. The Empire maintained a fairly tight control of the planet and a noticeable military presence.<ref name="TSB" />
